name: HireRight
description: Monitor background screening status and verify employee background checks through HireRight

credentialFields.label: Domain ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your unique API integration domain identifier (hr-domain-id), provided by HireRight

credentialFields.label: Company Login
credentialFields.helpText: Your unique company identifier (hr-company-login), provided by HireRight

credentialFields.label: User Reference ID
credentialFields.helpText: The unique user identifier (hr-user-ref-id), typically an admin user email address

credentialFields.label: API Subscription Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your API subscription key (hr-api-subscription-key), provided by HireRight

checks.name: Employee Verification
checks.description: Verifies that the organization has active background screening capability through HireRight and checks order completion status
